Operation 'getPaymentStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on what specific details are returned, authentication requirements, and confirms no side effects. Added details about expected response fields and authentication mechanism for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve the status and details of a payment by order number.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current status and transaction details of a payment using the order number. Returns payment status (e.g., completed, pending, failed), transaction ID, amount, timestamp, and merchant reference. No state changes occur. Requires valid merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what specific details are returned, authentication requirements, and confirms no side effects. Added details about expected response fields and authentication mechanism for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'refundPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is incomplete. Added clarity on input parameters (order number, optional amount), expected outputs (refund transaction ID, status, amount), and critical side effects (state change, fund reversal). Included authentication requirement for AI agent context.

data.current_description: Process a full or partial refund for a completed payment.
data.description_suggestion: Process a full or partial refund for a completed payment transaction. Accepts order number and optional refund amount (full refund if omitted). Returns refund transaction ID, status, and processed amount. Modifies payment state and initiates fund reversal to original payment method. Requires merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete. Added clarity on input parameters (order number, optional amount), expected outputs (refund transaction ID, status, amount), and critical side effects (state change, fund reversal). Included authentication requirement for AI agent context.

message: Operation 'lookupBin' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary 'BIN lookup service' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced with clear input format, specific return fields (brand, issuer, type, country), and clarification that it's read-only for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Look up card details by the first 6 or 8 digits of the card number.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve card details from BIN number
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve card issuer and type information by querying the Bank Identification Number (BIN). Accepts the first 6 or 8 digits of a card number. Returns card brand (Visa, Mastercard, etc.), issuer bank name, card type (credit/debit), and country of issue. Read-only operation with no side effects. Requires merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Summary 'BIN lookup service' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced with clear input format, specific return fields (brand, issuer, type, country), and clarification that it's read-only for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getInstallmentRates' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks detail on inputs (optional filters), outputs (specific rate information), and use case context. Added clarity on what parameters can be filtered, specific response fields, and business context for AI agent to understand when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve available installment rates by card type.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve available installment plan rates and terms organized by card type and issuer. Accepts optional filters for card brand or payment amount. Returns installment options with number of installments, interest rates, and total cost for each plan. Read-only operation. Useful for displaying payment options to customers. Requires merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail on inputs (optional filters), outputs (specific rate information), and use case context. Added clarity on what parameters can be filtered, specific response fields, and business context for AI agent to understand when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'getPaymentStatement' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is vague about required inputs and specific output fields. Added clarity on mandatory parameters (date range), specific metrics returned (counts, amounts, breakdowns), optional filters, and authentication requirement for AI agent to properly construct requests.

data.current_description: Retrieve payment summary report for a date range.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated payment summary report for a specified date range. Accepts start and end dates as required parameters. Returns total transaction count, total amount processed, successful/failed transaction breakdown, and settlement status. Supports optional filtering by payment method or merchant reference. Read-only operation. Requires merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about required inputs and specific output fields. Added clarity on mandatory parameters (date range), specific metrics returned (counts, amounts, breakdowns), optional filters, and authentication requirement for AI agent to properly construct requests.

message: Operation 'getPaymentDetail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks specificity on inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required parameter (date), optional filters, specific transaction-level fields returned, and authentication requirement. Distinguished from statement report by emphasizing transaction-level detail for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed payment report for a specific date.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve line-item payment report with transaction-level details for a specific date. Accepts date as required parameter and optional filters (payment method, status, merchant reference). Returns individual transaction records including order number, amount, status, timestamp, customer reference, and settlement information. Read-only operation. Requires merchant authentication via HMAC token.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity on inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required parameter (date), optional filters, specific transaction-level fields returned, and authentication requirement. data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity on inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required parameter (date), optional filters, specific transaction-level fields returned, and authentication requirement. Distinguished from statement report by emphasizing transaction-level detail for AI agent understanding.
